MENU & PRICING

Every occasion deserves something sweet

All cakes are freshly made to order. Customisable flavours, colours & themes.

Unicorn Cake
Gold horn, buttercream roses in pastel pinks and lilacs. Our most-loved signature design — perfect for birthdays.

WORKSHOPS

Learn to make beautiful cakes

Hands-on classes for beginners, kids & adults. Everything provided — just show up and have fun!

🦄
Unicorn Cupcake Workshop
Learn to make buttercream from scratch, pipe roses and star swirls, and decorate 6 adorable unicorn cupcakes to take home. No experience needed!
2 hoursAll levelsBalcattaEverything provided
$70 / person
🧜‍♀️
Mermaid Cupcake Workshop
Create ocean-themed cupcakes with sea-swirl buttercream, glitter starfish & a mermaid tail centrepiece. Fun for kids & adults alike.
2 hoursKids welcomeBalcattaTake home 6 cupcakes
$70 / person
💐
Cupcake Bouquet Class
Design your own flower cupcake bouquet — learn piping, arrangement & wrapping. A beautiful skill for gifting all year round.
2.5 hoursAdultsBalcatta
$85 / person
🎉
Private Group Booking
Birthday parties, hens nights, kids' events or corporate team-building. Fully customisable theme, date & group size — up to 15 people.
Flexible hoursUp to 15 guestsCustom theme

Made with love by Tuyên

Hi, I'm Tuyên — a cake artist based in Balcatta, Perth WA. I started making cakes for my family, and after years of requests from friends and their friends, Cake Art by Tuyên was born.

Every cake I make is crafted entirely by hand, using high-quality ingredients and a whole lot of love. I believe a beautiful cake makes any celebration more magical.

📍 Balcatta, WA 6021  ·  🇦🇺 Perth, Western Australia
